Ian Michael Ellis, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T:510.879.1001, for defendant and moving party;
Vadim Nebuchin, Esq. of Calloway & Wolf, T:415.541.0300, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The tentative ruling was contested and argued. At the conclusion of arguments,

DEFENDANTS TIMOTHY BARBER, BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken under submission. Plaintiff may submit a short supplemental brief, no longer than 3 pages, in response to the additional authorities cited by defendant at the hearing. Plaintiff may also file a response to defendant's reply. These documents must be filed no later than October 15.
